title: Poses
body:
Poses

### ### ###

Express yourself like never before in Minecraft!

## Features - Add a personal touch to your Minecraft gameplay while maintaining the vanilla feel! - Interact with the other players and get creative using 10 various poses. # ## Compatibility - If you'd like to prevent an item from being used with poses, you can create a datapack and use the "**non_usable_tag**" to disable it. #
